name: Bly Kids' Activity Table White - Pillowfort™
description:
They'll love reading books, drawing pictures and enjoying a variety of other activities at this cute and convenient Bly Kids' Activity Table from Pillowfort™. Designed with a long, rectangular tabletop and trestle base, this kids' desk is perfect for creating a designated area for them to do homework or get creative with arts and crafts. The white finish on the wood veneer coordinates easily with a wide variety of room decor, while the sides and two built-in open storage cubbies boast a contrasting accent color with their natural wood finish. Style it solo with a lamp and chair, or coordinate with other pieces from the Pillowfort Bly Kids' Collection for a tidy matching look.

Overall Width: 23.75 inches
Overall Height: 24 inches
Overall Depth: 48.125 inches
Width of Top: 46.06 inches
Depth of Top: 23.6 inches
Height of Shelf: 3.55 inches
Width of Cubbie: 22.15 inches
Depth of Cubbie: 18.11 inches
Length of Metal Tube: 47 inches
Diameter of Metal Tube: 1 inch
